initial_candidates.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE packaging_tree AS (
  SELECT 
    packaging_id,
    contains_id,
    qty,
    qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    pt.packaging_id,
    pr.contains_id,
    pr.qty,
    pt.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_tree pt
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON pt.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
),
leaf_items AS (
  SELECT 
    packaging_id,
    contains_id AS leaf_id,
    total_qty
  FROM packaging_tree
  WHERE contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
)
SELECT 
  AVG(total_qty) AS avg_total_quantity
FROM leaf_items;

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
    SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, 1 AS level
    FROM packaging_relations
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ep.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, ep.qty * pr.qty, ep.level + 1
    FROM expanded_packaging ep
    JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
),
leaf_items AS (
    SELECT ep.packaging_id, ep.contains_id AS leaf_id, ep.qty AS total_qty
    FROM expanded_packaging ep
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM packaging_relations pr WHERE pr.packaging_id = ep.contains_id
    )
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM leaf_items;

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  SELECT packaging_id, contains_id, qty, qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  WHERE contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
  UNION ALL
  SELECT ep.packaging_id, pr.contains_id, pr.qty, ep.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM expanded_packaging ep
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.contains_id = pr.packaging_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM expanded_packaging
WHERE contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations);

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  -- Base case: leaf items (items that are not containers, i.e., not in packaging_id)
  SELECT pr.contains_id AS item_id, pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations pr
  WHERE pr.contains_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations)
  
  UNION ALL
  
  -- Recursive case: expand containers
  SELECT pr.packaging_id AS item_id, ep.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations pr
  JOIN expanded_packaging ep ON pr.contains_id = ep.item_id
),
final_packaging_combinations AS (
  -- Get all root packaging items (those that are not contained in any other packaging)
  SELECT p.id AS root_id, ep.item_id, ep.total_qty
  FROM packaging p
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON p.id = pr.packaging_id
  JOIN expanded_packaging ep ON pr.contains_id = ep.item_id
  WHERE p.id NOT IN (SELECT contains_id FROM packaging_relations)
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS avg_total_quantity
FROM (
  SELECT root_id, SUM(total_qty) AS total_qty
  FROM final_packaging_combinations
  GROUP BY root_id
);

WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  SELECT 
    packaging_id AS root_id,
    contains_id AS leaf_id,
    qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    ep.root_id,
    pr.contains_id AS leaf_id,
    ep.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM expanded_packaging ep
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.leaf_id = pr.packaging_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM expanded_packaging
WHERE leaf_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations);

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH RECURSIVE expanded_packaging AS (
  SELECT 
    packaging_id AS root_id,
    contains_id AS leaf_id,
    qty AS total_qty
  FROM packaging_relations
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 
    ep.root_id,
    pr.contains_id AS leaf_id,
    ep.total_qty * pr.qty AS total_qty
  FROM expanded_packaging ep
  JOIN packaging_relations pr ON ep.leaf_id = pr.packaging_id
)
SELECT AVG(total_qty) AS average_total_quantity
FROM expanded_packaging
WHERE leaf_id NOT IN (SELECT packaging_id FROM packaging_relations);
